def negative_branching_on_file_suffix_or_mode_string_scattered_across_codebase():
    rule_id = "branching_on_file_suffix_or_mode_string_scattered_across_codebase"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag suffix or mode dispatch logic duplicated across distant modules."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
